channel.title: Securifera, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Securifera, Inc. (securifera).

item.title: CVE-2022-48604 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A SQL injection vulnerability exists in the “logging export” feature of the ScienceLogic SL1 that takes unsanitized user‐controlled input and passes it directly to a SQL query. This allows for the injection of arbitrary SQL before being executed agai…

item.title: CVE-2022-48603 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: A SQL injection vulnerability exists in the “message viewer iframe” feature of the ScienceLogic SL1 that takes unsanitized user‐controlled input and passes it directly to a SQL query. This allows for the injection of arbitrary SQL before being execut…

item.description: A SQL injection vulnerability exists in the “message viewer print” feature of the ScienceLogic SL1 that takes unsanitized user‐controlled input and passes it directly to a SQL query. This allows for the injection of arbitrary SQL before being execute…
